issues.description: Condition should check Leader type, not board presence. Should be 'LeaderHasType' with type:'Blackbeard Pirates', not 'HasCardOnBoard'
Action 'Rest' is incorrect for negating an effect. No standard action exists for effect negation in OPTCG DSL; this represents a non-standard game mechanic that cannot be properly encoded
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is incomplete. Should specify maxCost constraint or use conditional targeting based on cost check result
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and no condition is malformed. Trigger type requires associated condition context
Missing duration specification. Text 'during this turn' indicates duration should be 'DuringYourTurn'
